ext_description.message: Convert any webpage to clean Markdown or JSON with one click. Feeds AI/LLMs directly. Chrome & Edge compatible.

footer.message: Requests go directly from your IP to the conversion service. Rate limit: 20 requests/min. No backend.

footer_lang_note.message: The extension name follows your browser's language.

status_local.message: Conversion done (local mode: remote blocked by anti-bot, fetched locally via your browser)

err_empty_url.message: Please enter or paste a URL first

err_bad_url.message: Invalid URL. Must start with http:// or https://

err_rate_limit.message: Too many requests. Free tier limit is 20 requests/min. Please wait and retry.

err_timeout.message: Request timed out (30s). Check your network and retry.

err_no_service.message: Cannot reach the conversion service. Check your network and retry.

err_local_unreachable.message: This page can't be fetched locally either (may require login or is anti-bot protected).

err_blocked_local.message: This page is protected by anti-bot (e.g. Cloudflare). Local mode can't extract content either.

err_copy_failed.message: Copy failed. Please select the result manually and copy.

hint_selection.message: 💡 Select text on the page before opening this extension to convert only the selection. Shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+M.

err_no_selection.message: Selected text is empty. Will convert the full page.
